SPStudyPlanner

Open the StudyPlanner →
How it worksFor universitiesDemoContactOpen the StudyPlanner →

Coordinators shouldn't be a human plan validator.

Hundreds of emails per term

Students send half-built plans asking what counts and what doesn't. The same questions, every quarter.

Invalid plans surface late

EC totals, prerequisite chains, and PPD credits often only get checked when it's too late to swap a course.

No view across the cohort

Each plan lives in a PDF or Excel sheet on a student's laptop. No data, no patterns, no way to improve the programme.

How it works

A guided flow that takes a student from blank canvas to a valid, coordinator-ready plan in under fifteen minutes.

  1. 1

    Pick track + profile

    Mandatory courses pre-load automatically based on the student's specialisation.

  2. 2

    AI suggests electives

    Students describe their interests; the planner recommends electives with explanations grounded in the catalogue.

  3. 3

    Real-time validation

    EC totals, PPD credits, quarter workload, and prerequisite conflicts are checked as the plan is built.

  4. 4

    Share with advisor

    One-click share link. Advisors review and comment without creating an account.

What students get

Guided setup

Track and profile selection pre-loads mandatory courses and exclusions.

AI elective suggestions

Grounded in the official catalogue, with reasoning the student can defend.

Real-time validation

EC totals, PPD credits, prerequisites, and quarter workload — checked as you type.

Plan A / B comparison

Side-by-side view of two variants so students decide with full context.

Advisor share links

One click. Advisors comment in-line. No accounts, no Outlook threads.

Full plan review

AI checks the finished plan against all programme rules in one pass.

No account required

Plans save locally by default. Optional sign-in for sync and sharing.

Multi-university

Same codebase, your branding, your catalogue, your rules.
